title: centranthera cochinchinensis var. longiflora
intro: Centranthera cochinchinensis var. longiflora, also known as the Long-flowered Centranthera or Long-flowered Dragon Flower, is a plant species belonging to the family Plantaginaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Centranthera cochinchinensis var. longiflora include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Centranthera cochinchinensis var. longiflora can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
